rules.title: Retail request routing policy
rules.logic: Small clean unsecured/deposit-backed cases may enter FAST/AUTO_APPROVAL; future-property, refinance, external-debt, or unverified-income cases must enter COMPLEX/HYBRID_APPROVAL.
rules.plain_finding: The router must choose the least privileged approval lane that still covers the risk profile.
rules.required_fix_template: If any complexity signal is present, route to hybrid review with credit, legal, and operations traces.

rules.title: Debt service stress affordability
rules.logic: The final proposal must keep stressed monthly obligations at or below 60% of qualified monthly income and mature before age 65.
rules.plain_finding: If the minimum viable proposal cannot pass the stress DTI cap, reject or request a lower amount.
rules.required_fix_template: Reduce requested amount, extend term within policy, refinance qualifying external debt, or request additional verified income.

rules.title: Collateral LTV cap
rules.logic: Future-property home loan exposure must remain at or below 70% of the value used for LTV.
rules.plain_finding: The proposal amount is capped by collateral value and product LTV policy.
rules.required_fix_template: Lower loan amount or request additional acceptable collateral.

rules.title: High side-effect approval guard
rules.logic: Hybrid HIGH tools such as LOS approval, facility creation, approval-letter rendering, and customer notification must stay blocked until a human approval token is issued.
rules.plain_finding: AI may recommend, but only a valid human approval token can unlock HIGH side-effect execution.
rules.required_fix_template: Keep HIGH tools in BLOCKED state until reviewer role, intent, and approval token are validated.
